title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Caesar P. Perez to Enter Into and Sign in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños in a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Department of Social Welfare and Development DSWD) for Support of Food and Non-food Items (NFI), Assistance to Individuals in Crisis Situation (AICS) and Social Pension for Indigent Senior Citizens (SOCPEN). (AUTHOR: HON. MIKO C. PELEGRINA, 10/07/2020)
